title: centaurium
intro: Centaurium, also known as centaury or mountain flax, is a perennial herb belonging to the gentian family, native to Europe and western Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. Centaurium has been used to treat various health issues such as digestive problems, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, with its health benefits including reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and enhanced immune function. Centaurium is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or extract, and can be consumed raw or dried, although its effectiveness and safety should be verified by a healthcare professional before use.
